hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'npm run dev|npx next dev'; then PIDS=$(lsof -ti:3000,3001,3002 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dev server already running on port 3000/3001/3002 (PIDs: '$PIDS'). Use the existing server or kill it first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
